rows.eligibility_reason: No written entry/exit/params in the thread; the only content is 'watch it here - Inserted Video' plus a promise to write it out later; nothing implementable.
rows.notes: 3-post thread, moved to commercial content because it is a video. Market/timeframe/session are placeholders only; the text states no instrument or timeframe. Revisit would require the promised written write-up with imagery, which is not present in this source.

notes: zero usable candidates: rules exist only in a linked video, none in text
